title: The Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971
full_text: The Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971 राष्‍ट्र-गौरव अपमान-निवारणअधिनियम, 1971 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1971-69 Act Number: 69 Enactment Date: 1971-12-23 Act Year: 1971 Short Title: The Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971 Hindi Title: राष्‍ट्र-गौरव अपमान-निवारणअधिनियम, 1971 Long Title: An Act to prevent insults to national honour. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 23-12-1971 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Prevention of Insults to National Honour Act, 1971 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Section 2. Insults to Indian National Flag and Constitution of India. Section 3. Prevention of singing of Indian National Anthem, etc. Section 3A. Enhanced penalty on second and subsequent convictions.
